finding: A. SUPPRESSION SCAN = to define autonomy of a nodule

differentials.name: STIMULATION SCAN =  to demonstrate thyroid tissue suppression by hyperfunctioning nodule
differentials.raw: STIMULATION SCAN =  to demonstrate thyroid tissue suppression by hyperfunctioning nodule

differentials.name: PERCHLORATE WASHOUT TEST =  to demonstrate organification defect
differentials.raw: PERCHLORATE WASHOUT TEST =  to demonstrate organification defect

differentials.name: Greater photon flux than iodine = detectability of small thyroid lesions (> 8 mm) is improved
differentials.raw: Greater photon flux than iodine = detectability of small thyroid lesions (> 8 mm) is improved

differentials.name: High neck background
differentials.raw: High neck background (target-to-background ratio less favorable than with iodine)

differentials.name: Lesions with pertechnetate-iodine discordance (= hot on 99mTc-pertechnetate + cold on radio-iodine) are very rare + due to 99mTc-avid cancer
differentials.raw: Lesions with pertechnetate-iodine discordance (= hot on 99mTc-pertechnetate + cold on radio-iodine) are very rare + due to 99mTc-avid cancer

differentials.name: Poor for substernal evaluation 123Iodine ◊  Agent of choice for thyroid imaging!
differentials.raw: Poor for substernal evaluation 123Iodine ◊  Agent of choice for thyroid imaging!

differentials.name: Higher dose to thyroid (but less to whole body) 131Iodine Indication:   thyroid uptake study, thyroid imaging, treatment of hyperthyroidism, treatment of functioning thyroid cancer, imaging of functioning metastases
differentials.raw: Higher dose to thyroid (but less to whole body) 131Iodine Indication:   thyroid uptake study, thyroid imaging, treatment of hyperthyroidism, treatment of functioning thyroid cancer, imaging of functioning metastases

differentials.name: Uptake and scan at same time
differentials.raw: Uptake and scan at same time

differentials.name: Too energetic for gamma camera, well suited for rectilinear scanner with limited resolution
differentials.raw: Too energetic for gamma camera, well suited for rectilinear scanner with limited resolution

differentials.name: High radiation exposure (← beta decay) → PROHIBITS USE FOR DIAGNOSTIC PURPOSES
differentials.raw: High radiation exposure (← beta decay) → PROHIBITS USE FOR DIAGNOSTIC PURPOSES

differentials.name: Ectopic thyroid tissue just as well detectable with 123I or 99mTc-pertechnetate 131Iodine SPECT/CT Advantage:   precise localization of foci of radioactivity to anatomic structures
differentials.raw: Ectopic thyroid tissue just as well detectable with 123I or 99mTc-pertechnetate 131Iodine SPECT/CT Advantage:   precise localization of foci of radioactivity to anatomic structures (incremental value over planar imaging in 40%)

context: √  suppression of a hot nodule following T3 / T4 administration is proof that autonomy does not exist √  administration of TSH documents functioning thyroid tissue (rarely done) √  repeat measurement of radioiodine uptake following oral potassium perchlorate shows lower values if organification defect present ◊  Best interpreted by direct comparison with sonography! 99mTc-Pertechnetate in Thyroid Imaging (99mTcO4-) Physical half-life (for gamma emission):   6.03 hours Biologic half-life:   1 day (94% decays to 99Tc in 24 hours) Decay:   by photon emission of 140 keV Quality control: Administra
